anomalies.old_value: High-performance HTTP web framework for Go
anomalies.new_value: Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

anomalies.new_value:
jHiccup is a non-intrusive instrumentation tool that logs and records
platform "hiccups" - including the JVM stalls that often happen when
Java applications are executed and/or any OS or hardware platform noise
that may cause the running application to not be continuously runnable.
